title: notopleura micayensis
intro: Notopleura micayensis is a plant species, also known as "Cinchona-like tree", which belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in the Amazon rainforest for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimalarial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating malaria, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and prevent the spread of certain bacteria. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are typically used to make teas and infusions, which are believed to be effective in treating various health conditions.
